backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the Raj Empire Esports backend, defining data types (Player, Tournament, Registration, SupportTicket, etc.) and CRUD functions for player registration, tournament management, OTP handling, support tickets, and social links.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (player registration, login, tournament listing, payment flow, etc.) to their corresponding source files, components, and test IDs with confidence ratings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-line summaries of key frontend source files including App.tsx, main.tsx, and several page components (TermsPage, AdminLoginPage, AdminDashboardPage).
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS stylesheet defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens (background, foreground, primary, chart colors, sidebar, etc.).
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Raj Empire Esports app, loading Google Fonts (Rajdhani, Orbitron, Saira Condensed) and mounting the React app via main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with all application routes (home, register, login, tournaments, dashboard, terms, admin) wrapped in AuthProvider and AdminAuthProvider contexts.
frontend/src/components/AdminProtectedRo: Route guard component that redirects unauthenticated admin users to /admin if they attempt to access protected admin routes.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer component displaying the brand logo, navigation links, and dynamic social media icons (YouTube, Instagram, Telegram) fetched from the backend.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky site header with logo, desktop/mobile navigation, and conditional auth controls (player name, logout button) based on login state.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Defines the main page layout wrapping a Header, Footer, and a TanStack Router Outlet for child routes on a dark background.
frontend/src/components/PaymentModal.tsx: Modal dialog for tournament registration that collects a UPI payment screenshot, validates terms agreement, and submits via the useRegisterForTournament mutation.
frontend/src/components/ProtectedRoute.t: Route guard component that redirects unauthenticated users to /login using the AuthContext.
frontend/src/context/AdminAuthContext.ts: React context providing hardcoded admin login/logout state persisted to localStorage for admin authentication.
frontend/src/context/AuthContext.tsx: React context managing player session state (mobile, displayName, bgmiPlayerId) with localStorage persistence for user authentication.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) based on the current Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook wrapping DFINITY's AuthClient for login, logout, and identity state management.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes TanStack Query hooks for fetching tournaments, support tickets, social links, and terms, as well as mutations for OTP, player registration, tournament registration, and support tickets.
frontend/src/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS stylesheet defining OKLCH-based design tokens, custom utility classes (clip paths, glows, gradients), and typography using Orbitron and Rajdhani fonts.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboardPage.ts: Admin dashboard page with tabbed interface for managing tournaments, support tickets, terms & conditions, and social links. Includes a modal form for creating tournaments with QR upload support.
frontend/src/pages/AdminLoginPage.tsx: Admin login page with username/password form that authenticates via AdminAuthContext and redirects to the dashboard on success.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: User dashboard page showing the player's tournaments and support tickets, with a modal to view ticket details including admin replies and screenshots.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Public landing page for Raj Empire Esports featuring a hero section, feature highlights grid, and call-to-action buttons linking to tournaments and registration.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Player login page implementing a two-step OTP flow: first collects a mobile number, then verifies a 4-digit OTP before logging the user in and redirecting to the dashboard.
frontend/src/pages/RegisterPage.tsx: Multi-step registration page (mobile → OTP → details) that collects mobile number, verifies OTP, then registers the player with display name and BGMI Player ID before redirecting to the dashboard.
frontend/src/pages/TermsPage.tsx: Displays the admin-editable Terms & Conditions content fetched from the backend, showing a loading skeleton or an empty-state message if no content is set.
frontend/src/pages/TournamentsPage.tsx: Lists all tournaments as cards showing entry fee, prize pool, slots, map, and schedule; authenticated players can open a payment modal to register, while full or non-upcoming tournaments disable registration.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with custom OKLCH-based color tokens (orange, gold, dark), esports-themed font families (Orbitron, Rajdhani, Saira), and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state manifest (version 17) describing the Raj Empire Esports BGMI tournament platform's features, architecture notes, known issues, and image requirements for build planning.
